_description: Rule dictionary for beehusTransactionType classification. Used by funcoes > identificar transactions. Hybrid model: rules evaluated first, ML fallback for unmatched rows.

_changelog.0.2.0-draft: Coverage validation against transactions_base.json (6056 rows). Added prefix-override rules for IR-/Custos Despesas/Ganho Rendimento/Ajuste contrib/Fee-, fixed dividend_en (English Dividend → coupon, US ETF convention), flipped resgate_cdb to buySell to match data, added BTC remuneration / matured bond / aplicacao fundos / debito CC / wired funds / interest income / pagamento juros BDA / pending card / sold-bought.
_changelog.0.1.0-draft: Initial draft from previous chat patterns.

_schema.rules: Array evaluated top-to-bottom; first matching rule wins. Order = priority. Most specific rules MUST come before generic ones.
_schema.rules.id: Stable identifier for traceability in classifier output.
_schema.rules.match: 'regex' | 'contains' | 'startswith'. All patterns are matched against the NORMALIZED description.
_schema.rules.pattern: Pattern matched against the description AFTER normalization (uppercase, mojibake-fixed, accent-stripped, whitespace-collapsed).
_schema.rules.examples: Sample RAW descriptions (pre-normalization) that should match this rule. Used for unit tests.
_schema.rules.counter_examples: Optional. RAW descriptions that look similar but should NOT match (catch over-matching).
_schema.rules.notes: Free-text rationale, edge-case warnings, or source of the rule.

_normalization.collapse_whitespace: Replace runs of whitespace with single space, trim ends.
_normalization._note: After normalization, 'Aquisição de cotas' becomes 'AQUISICAO DE COTAS'. Patterns must be written against the normalized form.

_thresholds._note: Rule matches always score 1.0. ML predictions below `ml_review_below` flagged as 'needs_review'. Below `ml_review_critical_below` are treated as unclassified. CONFIRMED by user (Q12).

rules.notes: PREFIX OVERRIDE — CONFIRMED by user. 'IR - X' is always tax; the suffix names what the tax is on. Must fire before sell_pt / resgate_cdb / fee rules.

examples: Ajuste contrib em lote 2026-01-30 NTN-B Ago/2050 Com coupon
rules.notes: PREFIX OVERRIDE — CONFIRMED by user. Custodian-side contribution adjustment. The 'Com coupon' / 'NTN-B' tokens are bond metadata (the security being adjusted), not the operation type. The operation is the adjustment itself.
PREFIX OVERRIDE. 'Fee - X' is a fee, even if X mentions Wire/TED/etc.

examples: LIQ BOLSA (ESTORNO DE TAXA SOBRE POSICAO 1026)
rules.notes: Must come before generic 'TAXA' so reversal isn't classified as the original fee.

examples: RENDIMENTOS - À VISTA s/ FII XYZ11
RENDIMENTOS s/ FII VBI PRI CI - PVBI11
rules.notes: FII cash dividend. Broadened in 0.2.x: any 'RENDIMENTOS ... FII ...' is dividend EXCEPT when the CETIP coupon variant matches first (rendimento_fii_cetip).
CETIP-settled FII payment is treated as coupon per source data convention.
BTC (lending) remuneration income. 88 rows in baseline. Must fire before fee_generic_pt.
BTC (lending) intermediation fee on the lender side. Wins over fee_generic_pt.

examples: Dividendo - acao - US:SPY - SPDR S&P 500 TRUST
Dividendo - acao - US:BUG - GLOBAL X CYBERSECURITY ETF
rules.notes: Aligned with dividend_en (Q4 confirmation): dividends on US tickers are still dividends. Rule kept as a documented carve-out so future-readers understand the US-asset case is intentional.

examples:
Redemption|UNITED STATES TREASURY NOTE
REDEMPTION OF MATURED BOND
RATE:...
rules.notes: CONFIRMED by user (Q11). US-bond maturity event delivered via 'Redemption' tag. Wins over buy_sell_en's 'REDEMPTION'.

examples: Taxa Custodia|LIQ BOLSA (TAXA SOBRE VALOR EM CUSTODIA TAXA SOBRE POSICAO 1026)|nan|nan
Taxa Custodia - LIQ BOLSA (TAXA SOBRE VALOR EM CUSTÓDIA TAXA SOBRE POSIÇÃO 1026)
rules.notes: CONFIRMED by user (Q8). Custody fee, even when wrapped in LIQ BOLSA. Must fire BEFORE ajuste_bolsa_taxa.
B3 position-based fee (lending). Distinct from corretagem and from estorno (above) and from taxa_custodia (custody).

examples: Depósito Pagamento mensal de juros BDA para reinvestimento Interest Earned on Bank Deposit Intended for Reinvestment USD
rules.notes: BDA (Bank Deposit Account) interest. 16 rows. Must fire before deposito_saque.
Imposto de Renda Retido na Fonte. Wins over JCP/dividend rules below — IRRF on a dividend is still a tax.
Imposto de Renda Pessoa Jurídica.
Imposto sobre Operações Financeiras.
Catch-all for 'imposto de renda' that is not IRRF/IRPJ.
Other federal/state taxes.
JCP. Must come AFTER irrf so 'IRRF S/ JCP' is taxes, not JCP.
Abbreviation form. Same precedence note as above.
English form for international/custodian feeds.
Coupon payment on Brazilian fixed income (NTN-F, NTN-B, etc.).

examples: Pgto Juros 24D3691425 | CRI TRUE SECURITIZADORA S.A. - SET/2029
rules.notes: Interest payment on Brazilian fixed income (CRI/CRA/debêntures/NTN). 'Pgto' is the abbreviated form of 'Pagamento'. Same outcome as recebimento_juros_titulo, kept as a distinct rule for traceability.
US/international feed — interest received on cash or bonds, treated as coupon.
Brazilian coupon payment.
English form. Comes after ajuste_contrib_lote so 'Ajuste contrib ... Com coupon' is not classified as coupon.
Periodic yield on bank-issued fixed income (when not a maturity).
PT form: DIVIDENDO / DIVIDENDOS. Distinct from English 'Dividend' which → coupon.

examples: Dividend STATE STREET SPDR S&P 500 ETF @ 1.993368 PER SHARE SPY
rules.notes: CONFIRMED by user: dividends are dividends regardless of language or asset domicile. Will intentionally disagree with the source file's 'coupon' labelling for ~51 rows.
Most fixed-income maturity events.
English/US feed equivalent.
Principal repayment between issuance and maturity.
English/US feed equivalent. Includes 'principal advance' style descriptions.
Brokerage commission. Wins over generic taxa rule. Comes AFTER custos_despesas_prefix because that override re-routes Corretagem inside P&L bookings to gainsExpenses.
English. Bond Fee is a per-trade brokerage charge on bond execution. CONFIRMED by user (Q10) — keep as brokerageFee, not generic otherFee.

examples: Taxa Administracao - RECOLH. TAXA DE ADM
rules.notes: Fund/portfolio management fee. CONFIRMED by user (Q7): 'Taxa de Gestão' is a management fee semantically, even though the source file labels these 12 rows as otherFee — we override. 'DE' is optional and 'ADM' abbreviation is supported.
English.
Fee/charge returned to the client. Comes AFTER ganho_rendimento_prefix because that override re-routes 'Ganho Rendimento - Rebate' bookings to gainsExpenses.
Custodian-side correction to security holdings.
Custodian-side correction to cash balance.
Asset (not cash) transfer between accounts/wallets.

examples: Transfer out of Acct|EUROPEAN MONETARY UNIT SAVINGSDEPOSIT
Deliver Wire PER YOUR REQUEST FED FUNDS USD
rules.notes: English. Broadened in 0.2.x to include Morgan Stanley/JPMorgan-style outbound asset transfers ('Transfer out of Acct', 'Deliver Wire'). Must fire BEFORE ted_doc_pix so the WIRE token doesn't win.
Equity/FI buy order.
Equity/FI sell order. NOTE: tax_ir_prefix wins for 'IR - Venda...' rows.
Fund unit subscription.
Fund unit redemption (NOT a cash sweep — see resgate_cdb below, also buySell).

examples: TED TER BCO 33 AGE 2271 CTA 13017209 1 - TED APLICAÇÃO FUNDOS Trend Investback F
rules.notes: Fund or fixed-income subscription described via TED/SELIC. Must fire BEFORE ted_doc_pix so the TED/PIX prefix doesn't win.

examples: EMISSAO - CDB BANCO BTG PACTUAL S.A. - Venc: 2028-01-03 XX1006454052
rules.notes: CDB / fixed-income issuance booked as a buy on the investor side.

examples: TRANSFERENCIA DO FUNDO CS EVOLUTION DI PRIVATE FC FIF RF REF RL
rules.notes: Inter-fund transfer counted as a buy/sell of fund units. Distinct from transfer_security_pt (asset transfer between custodians) and transferencia_caixa (cash transfer).

examples: RESGATE CDB12643P73 | CDB BANCO XP S.A. - JAN/2028
rules.notes: Fixed-income redemption. CONVENTION CONFIRMED by user: always buySell, even though some upstream banks deliver these as cash withdrawals. The classifier normalises to buySell.
English equivalents from international custodians. SOLD/BOUGHT added in 0.2.0. Comes after matured_bond which carves out matured-bond redemption → maturity.
Inter-bank transfers. NOTE: aplicacao_fundos and fee_dash_prefix carve out fund applications and 'Fee - Wire' fee bookings.

examples: Entrega Transferência eletrônica BANCO DE CREDITO E INVERSIONES
rules.notes: Itaú/BCI-style outbound transfer.

examples: INTERNAL TRANSFER TO MARCOS JOAQUIM GONCALVES ALVES
Misc. Disbursement TRANSFER OF FUNDS FROM EXXXX4000 TO 7XXXX6799 0USDPRAA7
Misc. Receipt EUR RECEIVED FROM 1/JPMORGAN CHASE BANK
rules.notes: Morgan Stanley / JPMorgan-style cash transfers and miscellaneous cash bookings.
Auto-redemption of SELIC float into a Tesouro Direto position. Mirrored by aplicacao_fundos for the other side.
US-bond sale ticket from international custodians.

examples:
Debit Card|HOTEL DE SAO JOSE DO
VISEU PT
rules.notes: CONFIRMED by user (Q9). 'Debit Card' is the operation itself — cash leaving the wallet. The inner content describes the destination (merchant, fee, etc.) but does not change the classification. Must fire BEFORE fee_generic_en.

examples: LIQ CAMBIO - BANCO BTG PACTUAL S A
rules.notes: FX settlement booked as a fee on the cash leg.
Generic cash transfer (must NOT match 'TRANSFERENCIA DE ATIVOS' — handled by transfer_security_pt above).
PT cash in/out. Comes after pagamento_mensal_juros_bda which carves out BDA interest.

examples: DÉBITO EM C/C VIA CIP - ANA PAULA GUARISI MENDES LEVADA
rules.notes: Itaú/CIP cash debit on current account.

examples:
Funds Received|WIRED FUNDS RECEIVED
BANCO ITAU EUROPA INTL
rules.notes: Morgan Stanley / JPMorgan-style wired-funds movements. Comes after fee_dash_prefix.

examples: Pending Card Trans|2026-01-02 GALP SALVAT DE MAGOS|nan|nan
rules.notes: Pending card transactions on US/international cash accounts.
English.
Realized P&L bookings. NOTE: 'GANHOS' removed in 0.2.0 because it conflicts with 'Ganho Rendimento' prefix.
Generic fee fallback. Comes AFTER brokerageFee, managementFee, gainsExpenses (LIQ BOLSA, TAXA REMUNERACAO), and ESTORNO so those win.
Generic English fee fallback. After brokerage/management/etc.
